  "findings": [
    "Sling angle measured/estimated below 30° from horizontal",
    "Sling tension exceeds safe working load due to shallow angle"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work and barricade area immediately",
    "Rerig load with longer slings or spreader beam to achieve at least 30° included angle",
    "Recalculate sling tension and verify capacity before lifting"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926.251(c)(4) and ASME B30.9 require sling angles not less than 30° from horizontal unless specifically rated. Angles below 30° multiply sling tension drastically, creating overload and potential catastrophic failure.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.251(c)(4)",
    "ASME B30.9-2018"
  ]
